summary: Excellent audience recording of a scorching 1979 show, with crystal‑clear sound and high energy.
review: All five reviewers rave about the tape’s clarity – cutting the treble makes it sound great and they call it a reference‑quality audience recording. The performance is described as “really hot” and “great,” indicating an energetic 1979 concert that lives up to the era’s reputation.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews praising both sound quality and show energy; no negative comments, giving a near‑perfect combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the tape sounds great after cutting treble, describing it as crisp, reference‑quality and one every taper aspires to.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply label the concert as a "hot" and "great" show.
